config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Ashby
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Paste the API key below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Ashby Settings > Integrations > API Keys
